calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Lanctot for John Zellerbach. Christy Styer for Frank Mahoney III.

Ms. Styer explained the extent of services provided by the Executor to support the fee request. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the will designating powers to elect and employ agents without adversly affecting compensation to which the Executor is entitled, spoke of the Decedent being known for trading gold coins and spoke of the manner in which some of the items were inventoried. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition For Order Instruction Co-Executors Re Executors' $1,000,000 Fund
Off Calendar Jun-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Lanctot and Paul Stewart for and with John Zellerbach. Isidoor Bornstein and Christy Styer for and with Frank Moahoney, III (Co-Executor).

Mr. Lanctot stated that there were no funds to purchase the annuities and that the Corporation was working on obtaining a million dollar loan and/or selling one of the properties. The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to costs of the annuities, the purchase of the annuities, reduction in payments to Ms. Hornsby and Mr. Lyman, periodic gifts and the Decedent's relationships with the Recipients. The matter was taken under submission. Mr. Lanctot submitted a redline version and a plain version of the order. The status hearing on calendar for May 19, 2009 was continued to August 11, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR#7077. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.

Petition To Confirm Transfer Of Beneficiary'S Interest
Off Calendar Sep-14-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Peter Lindman appeared in Propria Persona.
The Court informed Mr. Lindamn that the agreement needed to be signed and filed with in 30 days. Mr. Lindman replied that he was not aware of the procedure. Mr. Lindman reported that he had spoken to Mr. Starks on several occasions and he was aware of todays hearing. He also reported that further monetary advances were made after February. The Court took the matter under submission.
Judicial Officer: John Dearman; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722; Bailiff: Tony Aguerre; Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

MINI MINUTES: Lawrence Lanctot appearing for and with petitioner John Zellerbach. Mike Bassi appearing for and with nominated co-executor Frank Mahoney. Issue on the need of re-notice and re-publish due to two declination addressed. Matter submitted. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
